layers.notes: Arithmetic semantics of Q <- Q + L are exact on basis-state inputs at the kickmix ISA level.
The repo checks the signed/unsigned window contract, but does not ship a primitive-gate qRAM implementation.
The schedule is exact metadata plus sampled end-to-end replay, not a flat gate list for the whole Shor stack.
Cleanup remains an abstraction layer. The verifier only checks basis-state functional semantics, not primitive reversible cleanup.
Public baseline comparison is against 1191/81105024 and 1441/64305024.
